title: mandarus acuminata
intro: Mandarus acuminata, also known as the mandarin acuminata or Chinese bitter orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mandarus acuminata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in weight loss, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in culinary and perfumery applications.
